_schema: matter_id -> { artifact_type: { url, descriptor } } plus optional 'drafts' array. artifact_type examples: folder, discovery, pleadings, mediation (each a single object with url, descriptor). New in v2: drafts is an optional ARRAY of {type, url, descriptor, created, status} where status is one of: pending-review, sent, filed, awaiting-client. Empty registry = no buttons render.
